=== Sheffield.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Sheffield Arena
22nd September 2000
Crystal Cat

Lineage> audio trade 2001> EAC> TLH flac 8> HC


Disc One 
1.Intro
2.I Am The Man Thomas
3.The Times They Are A Changin
4.It's Alright Ma
5.Love Minus Zero/No Limit
6.Tangled Up In Blue
7.Searching For A Soldiers Grave
8.Country Pie
9.Dignity
10.All Along The Watchtower
11.Not Dark Yet
12.Cold Irons Bound
13.Leopard Skin Pillbox Hat
14.Love Sick
15.Like A Rolling Stone

Disc Two 
1.Mr. Tambourine Man
2.Things Have Changed
3.Forever Young
4.Highway 61 Revisited
5.Blowin In The Wind

Bonus Tracks
6.Tough Mama - George, Washington June 17, 2000 Gorge Amphitheater
7.Rank Strangers To Me - Medford, Oregon June 20, 2000 Jackson County Expo Hall
8.Shooting Star - Las Vegas, Nevada June 27, 2000 Mandalay Bay Resort 
9.Lucky Old Sun - Irvine, California June 29, 2000 Verizon Wireless Amphitheater
10.Tears Of Rage - Del Mar, California July 1, 2000 Del Mar Fairgrounds
11.Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues - Cincinnati, Ohio July 11, 2000 Riverbend Music Center
